name: CRE MARKET
bio: We are the new CRE industry marketplace and community hub for commercial real estate ecosystem.

customLinks.title: 💬 Social.
customLinks.description: Social is a Reddit-like platform for CRE brokers, investors, vendors and tenants with a portal to a video map and AI underwriter (Coming soon).

customLinks.title: 📍 What3Words CRE address
customLinks.description: Precise 3‑word address – Every CRE Market property gets a unique What3Words address that matches the TikTok AR effect name, pinpointing exact entrances, loading docks, or development parcels. No more vague directions.

customLinks.title: CRE Deal Stages as TikTok AR Effects
🧭 Sourcing
customLinks.description: Where is it at? The new CRE address system is powered by what3words.com keep it simple. Use the the hashtag #CREsourcing and tag @CREMARKET.

customLinks.title: 🔎 Underwriting
customLinks.description: Is it a good deal? Analyze numbers, video OM created replacing boring PDFs with engaging TikTok content. Use the the hashtag #CREunderwriting and tag @CREMARKET.

customLinks.title: 💼 Offer
customLinks.description: I want in! Post the offer, share the video, and get feedback from the community to move the deal forward. Use the the hashtag #CREoffer and tag @CREMARKET.

customLinks.title: 🏛️ Capital
customLinks.description: Got funding? Celebrate the win, share the news, and attract more investors with TikTok content. Use the the hashtag #CREcapital and tag @CREMARKET.

customLinks.title: 🏗️ Build
customLinks.description: Discuss development, construction, and value-add strategies with CRE builders, contractors, and service providers. Use the the hashtag #CREbuild and tag @CREMARKET.

customLinks.title: 🔑 Key
customLinks.description: Talk about the lease signing, property management, and operations with CRE operators, property managers, and tenants. Use the the hashtag #CREcontrol and tag @CREMARKET.

customLinks.title: 📈 Story
customLinks.description: What happened? Share the story behind the deal, the lessons learned, and the journey of the CRE industry with the community. Use the the hashtag #CREstory and tag @CREMARKET.

customLinks.title: 🛒 Telegram CRE MARKETPLACE
customLinks.description: Access the CRE Marketplace for online and offline deals — We connect principals, brokers, lenders, and investors across the capital stack.
